aboutUs.leftTopText:
Where Every
Connection Matters

Connect with real people worldwide through private video conversations. Make meaningful connections in a safe, intimate social space.

bottomQuestions.note: Kugo is a premium social app designed for authentic private connections. Meet real people from different countries, engage in meaningful conversations, and build genuine relationships in a safe and intimate environment.
Download Kugo from the Google Play Store, create your profile, and start connecting! Our smart matching system will help you find compatible people based on your interests and preferences.
Absolutely. We prioritize your safety with end-to-end encryption, verified profiles, and robust moderation. Your conversations are private, and you have full control over who can contact you.

Kugo offers both free and premium features. You can enjoy basic chat for free, with optional premium subscriptions for enhanced features like unlimited matches, priority matching, and exclusive filters.

Our intelligent matching algorithm considers your interests, country preferences, and interaction patterns to connect you with compatible people. The more you use Kugo, the better your matches become!

privacy.content:
Kugo Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2025-06-30

Contact us: solli.devid@gmail.com

Welcome to Kugo! This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your personal information when you use our platform at https://www.kugo.chat and our related applications and services (together, the "Kugo Services").

We genuinely care about your privacy. We want you to understand how we collect, use, and share your information—and the choices you have. Whether you're connecting with new friends, streaming live, or simply exploring, we're committed to being transparent about our data practices.

When you use Kugo, you may share personal information with others. For example, when you create your profile, broadcast content, or interact with other users—that information becomes part of your social experience. Since Kugo is built around real connections, some of your activity may be visible to other users. We encourage you to be thoughtful about what you share.

1. What Information Do We Collect

We collect information to provide you with the best possible experience on Kugo. Here's what we gather and how:

i. Information You Provide to Us

When you sign up, create your profile, or use our features, you choose to share information with us, including:

  • Registration details — Your date of birth, phone number (or email), password, user ID, and language preference
  • Profile information — Your display name, profile photos, gender, location, bio, social media links, education, and career details
  • Content you create — Comments, messages, photos, videos, live streams, and any other content you share on Kugo
  • Facial data — When you use our special effects or emoji features, we process your facial data locally to create these effects. This data isn't used for any other purpose without your explicit consent. We don't use facial data for marketing or share it with third parties. For profile verification, we compare your photo with a verification video to confirm you're real—we don't store the verification video afterward
  • Payment information — Bank account, PayPal, or other payment details when you make purchases
  • Transaction records — Purchase history and transaction IDs for paid services
  • Your contacts — With your permission, we can access your phone contacts to help you find friends on Kugo
  • Location data — Your GPS location when you allow it (you can change this in your device settings anytime)
  • Communications with us — Questions, feedback, or complaints you send to our support team
  • Survey and activity data — Information you provide when participating in surveys, contests, or promotions
  • Social media connections — Information from Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Google, or other platforms when you connect them to your Kugo account

ii. Information We Collect Automatically

When you use Kugo, we automatically collect certain information to keep our services running smoothly and to improve your experience:

  • Activity data — Your browsing history, search queries, videos you've watched, pages visited, when you were active, and how you interact with other users
  • Information from other sources — Additional data from games, services, or social networks you've connected to Kugo
  • Device information — Your operating system, browser type, device model and serial number, IP address, carrier, screen resolution, language settings, and device identifiers (IMEI, IMSI, MAC address)
  • App usage — Information about how you use other apps on your device
  • Location indicators — Location information from your SIM card
  • Advertising IDs — Mobile identifiers (Apple's IDFA or Google's AAID) that help us and our partners show you relevant ads
  • Content metadata — Information about your uploads like hashtags, captions, and when content was created
  • Cookies and similar tech — Small data files that help us remember your preferences, understand how you use Kugo, and improve our services

We may also create aggregated, anonymized data from your information—this doesn't identify you personally and helps us understand overall usage patterns.

Our use of cookies is governed by our Cookie Policy.

2. How We Use Your Information

We only use your information when we have a valid reason. Here's what we do with it:

  • Providing our services — Showing you content, enabling features, verifying your identity, and delivering prizes for promotions
  • Making things better — Improving and personalizing Kugo based on your preferences and feedback
  • Managing your account — Handling your registration, providing support, and sending important notices about your account or our services
  • Staying in touch — Communicating with you about updates, promotions, and changes to Kugo
  • Keeping content safe — Reviewing content to ensure it complies with our guidelines and applicable laws
  • Personalizing your experience — Analyzing your interests to show you content, products, and ads you might like
  • Understanding usage — Tracking metrics like visitor counts, video views, and demographic patterns
  • Security and safety — Verifying age requirements, fixing technical issues, and detecting fraud or illegal activity
  • Legal compliance — Enforcing our terms and meeting our legal obligations
  • Creating insights — Combining information for the purposes above

About Cookies

We use cookies and similar technologies (like web beacons and pixel tags) to understand how you use Kugo, enhance your experience, and improve our services. By using Kugo, you consent to our use of cookies.

We may link your contact information with your activity across devices. We're not responsible for third-party privacy practices—their policies apply to their services.

You can adjust cookie settings in your browser. Note that disabling cookies may affect some Kugo features, and you may need to adjust settings on each browser and device you use.

3. How We Share Your Information

If your profile is public, your content can be seen by anyone on Kugo and may be accessed or shared by others, including search engines and news sites. You can control who sees each video or photo you upload.

We may share your information with our corporate group (parent companies, subsidiaries, affiliates) to improve our platform and prevent misuse.

We share your information when you've given us consent, either directly or by your actions.

  • With our corporate family — We may share data with companies in our group for services, account management, personalization, analytics, security, and compliance.
  • With service providers — Trusted partners who help us with order fulfillment, payment processing, content personalization, analytics, security, data storage, and other features. They can only use your data to provide these services.
  • When you connect third-party services — If you link Kugo with another service, you're authorizing us to share information with them.
  • In business transitions — If we're involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred. We'll ensure the new entity honors this privacy policy.
  • For legal reasons — We may share information with authorities when required to comply with laws, enforce our terms, investigate violations, protect safety, or maintain our platform's security.
  • Aggregated data — We may share anonymized, combined data with partners for business analysis. This doesn't identify you personally.

4. International Data Transfers

Your information may be processed outside your country, including in places with different data protection laws. We implement appropriate safeguards—like standard contractual clauses—to protect your data during international transfers.

We may also transfer your data when necessary to fulfill our contract with you, protect your interests, or handle legal matters.

5. Links to Other Websites or Applications

Kugo may contain links to third-party websites, apps, or content. Once you leave our platform, different privacy rules apply. We don't control these external sites and aren't responsible for their privacy practices. Please review their policies before sharing your information.

6. Data Security

We take security seriously. We use administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your information—including encryption, access controls, and firewalls.

However, no system is perfectly secure. Please be careful about what you share and protect your password.

You're responsible for keeping your password and account information confidential.

7. Your Choices

You have control over your information:

  • Cookies — Adjust your browser settings to refuse cookies. Note that some Kugo features may not work properly without them
  • Push notifications — Turn these off in your device settings anytime
  • Device permissions — Disable GPS, microphone, camera, or other features in your device settings. You can also adjust privacy settings within Kugo to hide your location, videos, and activity
  • Limited information — You can choose not to provide certain information, but this may prevent you from using some features, making purchases, or participating in promotions
  • Advertising preferences — Change your device's advertising settings or visit http://www.networkadvertising.org/mobile-choice or http://youradchoices.com/appchoices
  • Update your info — Edit your profile directly in the app to access, correct, or delete your information

8. Your Rights

You can request to access, modify, or delete your personal information by:

  • Using the Help or Feedback feature in the app
  • Emailing us at solli.devid@gmail.com

We'll respond consistent with applicable laws after verifying your identity.

For California Residents

Access your data: You can request the categories and specific pieces of personal information we've collected or shared. Email solli.devid@gmail.com with the subject line: "Identification of Personal Information+Californian+Your Kugo ID"

Delete your data: Request deletion of your personal information by emailing solli.devid@gmail.com with the subject line: "Deletion of Personal Information+Californian+Your Kugo ID". Describe what you want deleted and provide details to help us locate it.

We may ask you to verify your identity before processing requests. Please note:

  • We cannot process requests via postal mail, phone, or fax
  • Complete deletion isn't guaranteed if data has been shared or reposted by others

Authorized agents: California residents can designate someone to exercise privacy rights on their behalf with a valid power of attorney.

9. Children Safety

Kugo is for users 18 years and older. We don't intentionally collect personal information from minors, though we may collect age data to verify eligibility.

If we discover we've collected information from someone under 18, we'll promptly delete it and ban the account. Please don't use Kugo if you're under 18.

Reporting Child Sexual Abuse Content (CSAM)

If you encounter potential CSAM on Kugo, please use our in-app report feature immediately. Our support team is available 24/7 and will review reports quickly. Confirmed CSAM will be reported to the National Center for Missing and Exploited Children (NCMEC).

You can also report through our official website's "Children Safety" page, which links directly to NCMEC.

10. Retention of Your Information

We keep your personal information as long as you maintain your Kugo account.

To delete your account:

  • Go to: Me > Settings > Account > Delete Account in the app, or
  • Email solli.devid@gmail.com

After your request and our review, we'll delete data that isn't needed for legal, regulatory, tax, or insurance purposes. We may retain some information temporarily for safety, security, fraud prevention, and research.

In some cases, we can't immediately delete your account—for example, if there's an outstanding balance or unresolved dispute. We'll delete it once the issue is resolved.

We may also retain limited information about deactivated accounts to prevent abuse.

11. Changes and Updates to This Privacy Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. While we'll try to notify you of significant changes through Kugo, please check back regularly.

Your continued use of Kugo after changes take effect means you accept the updated policy. If you disagree with any changes, please stop using Kugo and contact us at solli.devid@gmail.com.

12. How to Delete Your Account

We've made account deletion straightforward:

  1. Open the app and go to Settings > Account Settings > Delete Account
  2. Follow the on-screen instructions

For your security, we'll keep your account for 7 days after you confirm deletion. During this time, you can log back in to restore everything.

After 7 days, all your data is permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

If you've uninstalled the app, you can submit a deletion request through our website.

Footer Information

Address: Rm 303 3/F ST GEORGE'S BLDG, 2 ICE HSE ST, Central, Hong Kong

Copyright © 2025 LAA APPAREL LIMITED

userAgreement.content:
Kugo User Agreement

Last updated: 2025-06-30

Contact us: solli.devid@gmail.com

1. Special Notices

Welcome to Kugo! This User Agreement ("Agreement") governs your use of our services, including the Kugo App—a live video social platform where you can connect one-on-one with people around the world.

The parties to this Agreement:

  • You — the user
  • Us — LAA APPAREL LIMITED, a company registered at Rm 303 3/F ST GEORGE'S BLDG, 2 ICE HSE ST, Central, Hong Kong (referred to as "we", "our", or "Kugo")

When you use Kugo, you're also agreeing to our Privacy Policy and any additional guidelines we provide for specific features.

By using Kugo or clicking "Sign Up", you accept all terms in this Agreement. We may update these terms occasionally—the current version is always available in the app under About Us > User Agreement. Continuing to use Kugo means you accept any updates.

Age Requirement

You must be 18 years or older to use Kugo. If local laws in your country set a higher age for entering agreements, you must meet that requirement.

Account Responsibility

You're responsible for keeping your account and password secure. Everything that happens through your account is your responsibility.

Restricted Regions

We don't accept payments or do business with individuals or entities in Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, Syria, or the Crimean region. If you're from these regions, you may be prohibited from using Kugo.

2. Services Content

i. User Generated Content

Kugo lets you create and share live streams, chat messages, posts, photos, videos, and other content ("User Content"). You can also use Kugo's built-in features—music, graphics, stickers, virtual items—to enhance your content.

The views expressed by other users don't represent our views or values.

ii. Personalized Recommendations

We show you ads, offers, and sponsored content to help you discover products and services from businesses that use Kugo.

iii. Community Safety

We have dedicated teams worldwide and advanced systems to detect misuse, harmful behavior, and situations where we can help protect our community. When we identify problems, we take action—offering support, removing content, restricting features, disabling accounts, or contacting law enforcement when necessary.

iv. Global Infrastructure

To operate Kugo worldwide, we store and process data in data centers around the globe, including outside your country of residence. This infrastructure is operated by LAA APPAREL LIMITED and its affiliates.

3. Account

Creating Your Account

You'll provide an account name and password to get started. Keep this information accurate and up-to-date.

Your Responsibilities

You're responsible for:

  • Keeping your password confidential
  • Restricting access to your devices
  • All activity under your account

Third-Party Login

You can register or log in through third-party services. Their privacy policies govern how they handle your data. See our Privacy Policy for details on how we use information from connected accounts.

Account Suspension

We may disable your account if you:

  • Violate these terms
  • Engage in activities that could damage Kugo or harm others
  • Infringe third-party rights
  • Violate applicable laws

Account Deletion

Want to leave? Contact us at solli.devid@gmail.com and we'll guide you through the deletion process. Once deleted, your account and content cannot be recovered.

4. Privacy

Your privacy matters to us. Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. Please review it to understand your rights and choices.

5. Use of the Services

You agree to follow our Community Guidelines and these rules. You will not:

  • i. Create, upload, or share content that's inaccurate, unlawful, defamatory, obscene, pornographic, invasive of privacy, harassing, threatening, or abusive
  • ii. Impersonate others, claim false affiliations, access others' accounts without permission, or forge identities
  • iii. Harass, abuse, threaten, or defraud other users, or collect their personal information without consent
  • iv. Tamper with security features, copy-protection measures, or usage restrictions on Kugo
  • v. Reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to discover Kugo's source code (except where legally permitted)
  • vi. Modify, adapt, or create derivative works from Kugo (except where legally permitted)
  • vii. Upload viruses, malware, or other harmful code that could damage Kugo or users' devices
  • viii. Disguise the origin of content you transmit
  • ix. Interfere with Kugo's servers or networks, overburden our systems, or disrupt other users' experience
  • x. Attempt to access restricted areas or bypass content filters
  • xi. Use Kugo for illegal purposes or violate any applicable laws

Our Disclaimers

We're not responsible for User Content—including mistakes, defamation, obscenity, or other issues you might encounter. Using Kugo is at your own risk.

We don't endorse any User Content or opinions expressed by users. We reserve the right to remove or restrict any content at any time, with or without notice.

Violations may result in suspension or termination of your access to Kugo.

6. Virtual Items

Age Requirement

You must be 18 or older (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction) to buy Tokens, send Gifts, receive Gifts, earn Credits, or withdraw Credits.

Purchasing Tokens

  • Prices are displayed at checkout in the specified currency
  • Currency exchange fees and payment provider fees are your responsibility
  • Tokens appear in your account after purchase

Using Tokens and Gifts

  • Tokens can be used to purchase Gifts
  • Tokens cannot be exchanged for cash or any other currency
  • Tokens only work on Kugo and can't be combined with other promotions unless we specify

No Refunds

All sales of Tokens and Gifts are final. We don't offer refunds, and Tokens/Gifts cannot be converted to cash or reimbursed.

7. User-Generated Content

What You Can Create

You can create and share live streams, messages, text, photos, videos, audio, and other content on Kugo.

License You Grant Us

When you share content on Kugo, you grant us and our partners a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to use, copy, modify, distribute, display, and create derivative works from your content.

This license ends when you remove your content or close your account, except:

  • Content we've already used for promotional purposes
  • A reasonable time needed to remove from backups and systems

Content Moderation

We use both automated systems and human review to moderate content. You agree not to create or share:

  • Illegal content — Anything promoting violence, terrorism, drugs, or hate crimes
  • Discrimination — Content targeting people based on race, religion, nationality, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, or other protected characteristics
  • Harassment and threats — Bullying, intimidation, violence, or sharing personal information without consent (doxing)
  • Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM) — We have zero tolerance. Report any CSAM immediately through our app or to NCMEC
  • Violent threats — Content threatening harm to individuals or groups
  • Copyright infringement — Unauthorized use of others' intellectual property
  • Misinformation — False information that could harm public health or safety
  • Spam and malware — Unsolicited messages, phishing attempts, or malicious software
  • Self-harm content — Anything glorifying or encouraging self-harm or suicide

This list isn't exhaustive. We reserve the right to remove content at our discretion.

Enforcement

If you violate these terms, we may:

  • Remove your content
  • Restrict your access to features
  • Suspend or terminate your account

The severity of consequences depends on the frequency and seriousness of violations.

Your Responsibility

You're fully responsible for your content and any consequences of sharing it. We don't guarantee the accuracy, legality, or appropriateness of any User Content.

Don't share content you don't have the rights to. If you upload copyrighted material without permission, you're liable.

We don't endorse any opinions in User Content and disclaim all liability related to it.

8. Third-Party Content

Kugo may feature content from third parties. We don't control, endorse, or guarantee any third-party content—including its accuracy or completeness.

External Links

You may encounter links to other websites or apps. Your decision to visit them is yours alone. We're not responsible for:

  • The content or practices of linked sites
  • Any transactions or communications with advertisers
  • Products, services, or materials available through external sites

Access and use external sites at your own risk.

9. Payment Terms

We accept major credit cards, certain debit cards, and other payment methods available on our platform. By purchasing, you authorize us to charge your selected payment method.

Payment Processing

Our payment partners may request identification (government ID, name, address, date of birth) to process payments and comply with laws. They may contact you directly about payment issues.

Declined Payments

If your payment is declined, verify your information and try again. For help, contact solli.devid@gmail.com.

a. In-App Purchases

We may offer products through the App Store, Google Play, carrier billing, or Kugo direct billing. When you make a purchase, you confirm it with the payment provider and authorize the charge including applicable taxes.

b. Subscriptions and Auto-Renewal

Subscription purchases auto-renew until you cancel. After your initial term, subscriptions continue indefinitely at the agreed price. Your payment information is stored for automatic billing.

c. Payment Disputes

Contact customer support for billing issues, or reach out to your bank or payment provider for information about your rights and time limits. You can withdraw consent for automatic payments in Settings, but you're still responsible for outstanding amounts.

d. Canceling Subscriptions

Cancel through your third-party account (App Store, Google Play) or Kugo Settings. Simply deleting the app doesn't cancel your subscription—charges continue until you properly cancel. After canceling, you can use the service until your current term ends.

e. Virtual Items

You must be 18 or older to purchase virtual currency and gifts.

You're responsible for ensuring correct account details and amounts before purchases. Errors in entering information are your responsibility—we won't compensate for mistakes.

All virtual item purchases are final and non-refundable. You won't receive money or compensation for unused virtual items when your account closes.

10. Intellectual Property Rights

All Kugo content—text, images, graphics, audio, video, and materials—is our property, protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws. This Agreement doesn't transfer any intellectual property rights to you.

When you share content on Kugo, you grant us a permanent, irrevocable, non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to use, modify, adapt, distribute, and display that content in any media.

11. Terminating Services

We reserve the right to terminate your access to Kugo at any time, without notice, if:

  • You violate this Agreement
  • You misuse our services
  • Technical or business reasons require it

This includes terminating access to any purchased services.

Your only remedy for dissatisfaction with Kugo, our policies, or any content is to stop using our services.

12. Disclaimers

Use Kugo at your own risk.

We provide Kugo "as is" without any warranties. We don't guarantee that:

  • Kugo will meet your requirements
  • Kugo will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free
  • Content will be accurate or complete

We're not liable for any consequences of your use of Kugo.

We don't guarantee the accuracy of external links and aren't responsible for any linked content or resulting losses.

We're not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure or circumstances beyond our control, though we'll try to minimize any impact on you.

13. Legal Jurisdiction

This Agreement is governed by the laws of Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, without regard to conflict of law principles.

Dispute Resolution:

Any dispute arising from this Agreement—including questions about its existence, validity, or termination—will be resolved through arbitration administered by Hong Kong International Arbitration Centre (HKIAC) under the HKIAC Administered Arbitration Rules in effect at the time.

  • Seat of arbitration: Hong Kong
  • Language: English

14. Request for Information

All legal requests for information or documents—including those related to legal proceedings, investigations, or third-party user data—must be:

  • Made through proper legal process
  • Properly served on LAA APPAREL LIMITED

15. Modification of the Agreement

We may update these terms when we change our services, combine features, or respond to regulatory changes. We'll make reasonable efforts to notify you of significant changes through Kugo.

Check this Agreement regularly. Your continued use after changes means you accept them. If you disagree, stop using Kugo.

16. Other Terms

Complete Agreement

This Agreement represents the entire agreement between you and Kugo regarding its subject matter.

Severability

If any provision is found void or unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain valid.

Headings

Section headings are for convenience only and don't affect interpretation.

Footer Information

Address: Rm 303 3/F ST GEORGE'S BLDG, 2 ICE HSE ST, Central, Hong Kong

Copyright © 2025 LAA APPAREL LIMITED

safefyPolicy.content:
Child Safety Policy

Last Updated: February 2025

At Kugo, we are committed to maintaining a safe environment. We have zero tolerance for child exploitation of any kind.

Age Requirement

Kugo is strictly for users 18 years and older. We employ age verification measures and will immediately remove any users found to be underage.

Prohibited Content

The following is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate account termination and reporting to authorities:

  • Any sexual content involving minors
  • Attempts to contact minors
  • Sharing or requesting images of minors
  • Any form of child grooming or exploitation

Reporting

If you encounter any concerning behavior, report it immediately through the app or email us at solli.devid@gmail.com.

Cooperation with Authorities

We cooperate fully with law enforcement agencies worldwide in investigating and prosecuting child exploitation cases.

announcement.content:
Safety Announcements

Stay informed about our latest safety updates and community guidelines.

Latest Updates

  • February 2025: Enhanced content moderation AI deployed
  • January 2025: New reporting features added
  • December 2024: Partnership with safety organizations established

We continuously improve our safety measures to protect our community.

detectService.content:
Content Detection Service

We use advanced AI technology to detect and prevent harmful content on our platform.

How It Works

Our system automatically scans uploaded content to identify potentially harmful material. Suspicious content is flagged for human review.

Test Our Detection

Upload an image below to see our detection service in action.

reportCsam.content:
Report CSAM

If you have encountered Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM), please report it immediately.

How to Report

You can report through:

  • In-app reporting feature
  • Email: solli.devid@gmail.com
  • National Center for Missing & Exploited Children (NCMEC): CyberTipline

All reports are taken seriously and investigated thoroughly.
